PARAM.description: g must be non-null

PARAM.description: targetVertex must be non-null and exist in g
PARAM.name: targetVertex
PARAM.content: target vertex of the edge.

PARAM.description: weight is a valid value
PARAM.name: weight
PARAM.content: weight of the edge.

RETURN.description: newly created edge must not be null
RETURN.content: The newly created edge if added to the graph, otherwise null

PARAM.description: the graph for which the specified edge to be added must not be null

PARAM.description: source vertex of the edge must not be null
PARAM.name: sourceVertex
PARAM.content: source vertex of the edge.

PARAM.description: target vertex of the edge must not be null
PARAM.name: targetVertex
PARAM.content: target vertex of the edge.

RETURN.description: The newly created edge if added to the graph, otherwise null.
RETURN.content: The newly created edge if added to the graph, otherwise <code><b>null</b></code>.

PARAM.description: targetGraph must be the graph for which the specified edge to be added

PARAM.description: sourceGraph must be the graph in which the specified edge is already present
PARAM.name: sourceGraph
PARAM.content: the graph in which the specified edge is already present

PARAM.name: edge
PARAM.content: edge to add

RETURN.content: <tt>true</tt> if the target graph did not already contain the specified edge.

PARAM.description: destination must be a valid graph
PARAM.name: destination

PARAM.description: source must be a valid graph
PARAM.name: source
PARAM.content: the graph used as source for vertices and edges to add.

RETURN.description: true if and only if the destination graph has been changed as a result of this operation.
RETURN.content: true if and only if the destination graph has been changed as a result of this operation.

PARAM.description: destination must be a directed graph

PARAM.content: the graph to which vertices and edges are added.

PARAM.content: the graph used as source for vertices and edges to add.

PARAM.description: destination must be a valid graph
PARAM.name: destination
PARAM.content: the graph to which edges are to be added

PARAM.description: source must be a valid graph
PARAM.name: source
PARAM.content: the graph used as a source for edges to add

PARAM.description: edges must be a collection of edges
PARAM.name: edges
PARAM.content: the edges to be added

RETURN.description: true if this graph changed as a result of the call

PARAM.description: destination must be a graph
PARAM.name: destination
PARAM.content: the graph to which edges are to be added

PARAM.description: vertices must not be null and its elements must not be null
PARAM.name: vertices
PARAM.content: the vertices to be added to the graph.

RETURN.content: true if graph changed as a result of the call

THROWS.name: NullPointerException

PARAM.description: g must be a DirectedGraph
PARAM.name: g
PARAM.content: the graph to look for predecessors in.

PARAM.description: vertex must not be null
PARAM.name: vertex
PARAM.content: the vertex to get the predecessors of.

RETURN.description: a list of vertices that are the direct predecessors of a specified vertex
RETURN.content:
a list of vertices that are the direct predecessors of a
specified vertex. If the graph is a multigraph, vertices may appear more
than once in the returned list.

PARAM.description: the graph to look for successors in must be a DirectedGraph
PARAM.name: g
PARAM.content: the graph to look for successors in.

PARAM.description: the vertex to get the successors of cannot be null
PARAM.name: vertex
PARAM.content: the vertex to get the successors of.

RETURN.description: a list of the vertices that are the direct successors of the specified vertex.
RETURN.content: a list of vertices that are the direct successors of a specified vertex. If the graph is a multigraph vertices may appear more than once in the returned list.

PARAM.description: g must be a graph
PARAM.name: g

RETURN.content: an undirected view of the specified graph, if it is directed, or the specified graph itself if it is already undirected.

THROWS.description: if the graph is neither DirectedGraph nor UndirectedGraph.
THROWS.name: IllegalArgumentException
